summary.lv: BTCBIT, regulēta kriptovalūtu apmaiņas FinTech kompānija, meklē juristu ar 3-5 gadu pieredzi, kas pārzina maksājumu un finanšu likumdošanu, lai sniegtu juridisko atbalstu starptautiskai komandai.
summary.en: BTCBIT, a regulated crypto exchange FinTech, is hiring a Lawyer with 3-5 years' experience in payments and financial law to provide legal support to its international team.
